title: pergularia glabra
intro: Pergularia glabra, also known as Convolvulus glaber, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Convolvulaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Pergularia glabra include its ability to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and stress, as well as its potential to reduce fever and relieve menstrual cramps. Pergularia glabra can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or powder, and is often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various health conditions.
